texto: Prayer is a kind of calling home every day. And there can come to you a serenity a feeling of at-homeness in God's universe a peace that the world can neither give nor disturb a fresh courage a new insight a holy boldness that you'll never never get any other way.
explicacao: Citação de Earl G. Hunt sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Prayer is a kind of calling home every day. And there can come to you a serenity a feeling of at-…” articula reflexao, prayer, never em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
